rows.command_eng: Every hour, repeat opening and closing the door.
Every 5 minutes from 1 PM to 3 PM, repeat opening and closing the valve.
Every 30 minutes, toggle the living room air purifier between sleep mode and auto mode.
Repeat opening and closing the window every 10 minutes.
Every 30 minutes, toggle the air purifier between sleep mode and high speed mode.
Every hour, repeat opening and closing the door.
rows.candidates: ["{\"name\":\"EveryHourOpenAndCloseDoor\",\"cron\":\"\",\"period\":0,\"code\":\"prev := (#Door).door_doorstate\\ncurr = (#Door).door_doorstate\\nif (prev == \\\"closed\\\" and curr == \\\"open\\\") {\\n    delay(1 HOUR)\\n    (#Door).door_open()\\n    delay(1 HOUR)\\n    (#Door).door_close()\\n}\\nprev = curr\"}"]

rows.command_eng: Every 5 minutes from 1 PM to 3 PM, repeat opening and closing the valve.
rows.candidates: ["{\"name\":\"Every5MinutesFrom1PMto3PMRepeatOpenAndCloseValve\",\"cron\":\"\",\"period\":0,\"code\":\"wait until ((#Clock).clock_hour == 13 and (#Clock).clock_minute == 0)\\nwait until ((#Clock).clock_hour == 15 and (#Clock).clock_minute == 0)\\nif ((#Valve).valve_valvestate == false) {\\n    (#Valve).valve_open()\\n}\\ndelay(300 SEC)\\nif ((#Valve).valve_valvestate == true) {\\n    (#Valve).valve_close()\\n}\\ndelay(300 SEC)\"}"]
